basic_details.job_title: SGGU Godhra Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Apply Online for 820 Librarian, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Principal, Assistant Professor, Librarian, P.T.I. (Physical Training Instructor), Tutor
basic_details.department: Various Affiliated Self-Finance Colleges under Shri Govind Guru University
basic_details.short_information: Shri Govind Guru University (SGGU), Godhra has released the official Self-Finance College Academic Staff Notification 2026 on 01 May 2026 at the official website www.sggu.ac.in. A total of 820 vacancies for Principal, Assistant Professor, Librarian, P.T.I., and Tutor posts have been announced under the SGGU Self-Finance College Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between as per UGC/NCTE/INC norms with the required educational qualifications can apply online through the Samarth Portal from 01 May 2026 to 25 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are provided

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on SGGU website
important_dates.merit list, college allocation & appoint: On the same day after merit list preparation (to be notified)

application_fee.payment_mode: Online only (Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / UPI)
application_fee.details: Candidates applying for SGGU Godhra Self-Finance College Academic Staff Recruitment 2026 are required to pay a non-refundable application fee online through the Samarth Portal. Applications without the requisite fee will not be accepted.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of online application (25-05-2026). Educational qualifications must be as per UGC/NCTE/INC norms and other applicable regulatory body requirements. Eligibility is subject to verification of original documents at the time of interview. Candidates must upload a valid NOC (if applicable) along with all required documents. College-wise and subject-wise vacancy details are available on the official SGGU website. | Educational Qualification

vacancy_details.College Category: Diploma and Health Sanitary Inspector Colleges
General Colleges (Arts, Science, Commerce, Law, etc.)

selection_process: Stage 1 – Online Application Submit application through Samarth Portal via official SGGU website before the last date.
Stage 2 – Interview Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview at their own expense. Date, time, and venue will be notified on the university website.
Stage 3 – Document Verification Candidates must bring Hard Copy of the online application form along with all original certificates and self-attested copies for verification at the time of interview.

Stage 4 – Merit List & College Allocation After merit list preparation, candidates and college authorities are called to the university. Candidates are offered different college options based on merit. Appointment letter issued by the respective college on the same day.
The selection process for SGGU Godhra Self-Finance College Recruitment 2026 consists of 4 stages - Online Application
and Merit-based College Allocation. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview at their own expense at the date
and venue specified on the university website. After the merit list is prepared

candidates and college management authorities will be summoned to the university and candidates will be offered different college options based on their merit. The selected candidate will receive the appointment letter from the respective college on the same day.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Samarth Portal accessible via the official SGGU website at https://www.sggu.ac.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. A valid personal email ID and mobile number are mandatory, as all communications will be sent via email/SMS. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling in the application form.

After successful submission, candidates must take a printout of the final submitted online application form (Hard Copy). This Hard Copy along with all original certificates and one set of self-attested copies must be brought for verification at the time of interview. Incomplete applications or applications without fee will not be accepted.
Recent passport size photograph (as per specifications)
Educational certificates and marksheets (X/SSLC, XII/HSC, Graduation, Post-Graduation, Ph.D. as applicable)
NET/SLET/Ph.D. certificate as per UGC regulations (if applicable)
Documents to be Brought at the Time of Interview (Originals + Self-Attested Copies):
Hard Copy (printout) of the online application form
All original educational qualification certificates and marksheets
Any other documents as required by the University
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted online only through the Samarth Portal via the official SGGU website - applications in any other mode will not be accepted. Candidates must ensure they meet all eligibility criteria as per UGC/NCTE/INC and other applicable regulatory body norms before applying. Application fee of Rs. 500/- is non-refundable and must be paid online - incomplete applications or applications without fee will not be accepted. Candidates must upload all required documents including educational certificates, NOC (if applicable), and category certificate (if applicable) at the time of online application. Hard Copy (printout) of the online application form along with all original certificates and self-attested copies must be brought for verification at the time of interview. Candidates will have to appear for the interview at their own expense - no travel allowance will be provided. After the merit list is prepared, candidates will be offered different college options based on merit and the appointment letter will be issued by the respective college on the same day. Candidates are advised to visit the official SGGU website regularly for updates on interview dates, venue, and other recruitment stages. College-wise and subject-wise vacancy details are available on the official SGGU website at www.sggu.ac.in.

faq.question: Q1. What is SGGU Godhra Self-Finance College Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Shri Govind Guru University (SGGU), Godhra has released Advertisement No. 01/SF/2026 dated 01 May 2026 for recruitment of 820 academic staff posts (Principal, Assistant Professor, Librarian, P.T.I. and Tutor) in various affiliated self‑finance colleges.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in SGGU Self-Finance College Academic Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 820 total vacancies, including 64 posts of Principal, 565 Assistant Professors, 64 Librarians, 41 P.T.I. and 86 Tutor posts, distributed across 106 self‑finance colleges under SGGU.

faq.question: Q3. What are the application dates for SGGU Godhra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process runs from 01 May 2026 to 25 May 2026, and candidates must submit their applications through the Samarth Portal within this period; dates for interview and merit list will be notified on the SGGU website.

faq.question: Q4. Through which portal can I apply for SGGU Self-Finance College posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online only via the Samarth Portal accessible through the official SGGU website [www.sggu.ac.in], and no other mode of application will be accepted.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility criteria for SGGU Assistant Professor, Principal, Librarian, P.T.I. and Tutor posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications and experience must be as per UGC/NCTE/INC norms: generally a PG degree with 55% and NET/SLET/Ph.D. for Principal/Assistant Professor/Librarian, B.P.Ed. or equivalent for P.T.I., and relevant degree/diploma such as B.Sc Nursing for Tutor posts in professional colleges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SGGU Godhra Self-Finance College Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All candidates have to pay a non‑refundable application fee of Rs. 500 through online payment modes (Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI) while submitting the form on the Samarth Portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SGGU Self-Finance College Academic Staff posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes online application screening, personal interview, document verification, and then merit‑based college allocation, after which appointment letters are issued by the respective colleges.

faq.question: Q8. Do I need to send a hard copy of the application to SGGU?
faq.answer: You are not required to send the hard copy by post, but you must take a printout of the final submitted online application and bring it along with all original documents and self‑attested copies at the time of interview for verification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required at the time of interview for SGGU Godhra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must produce the printed online application, all original educational certificates and marksheets, NET/SLET/Ph.D. certificates (if applicable), experience certificates, caste/category certificate, and NOC from current employer where applicable, along with one set of self‑attested copies.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the SGGU Godhra Self-Finance College Recruitment 2026 notification PDF?
faq.answer: The detailed notification PDF, college‑wise and post‑wise vacancy list, and the online application link are available on the official SGGU website under the recruitment section and via the Samarth Portal link published there.
